description_long: This is a single athletic trail running shoe, predominantly navy blue and light gray, with a rugged, lugged sole designed for traction on uneven surfaces. The upper is constructed from a breathable mesh material with synthetic overlays for added durability and structure, and features a visible GORE-TEX tag indicating waterproofing. The shoe has a standard criss-cross lacing system with round, two-tone laces in green and black, and reinforced eyelets for secure fastening. The midsole appears cushioned for comfort and shock absorption, while the outsole is made of thick, textured rubber for enhanced grip. Branding is visible on the side, with the word 'MERRELL' in yellow, and the overall condition shows signs of dirt and wear, suggesting it has been used outdoors.
description: A navy blue and gray trail running shoe with rugged lugged sole, mesh upper, and criss-cross laces, showing signs of outdoor use.
description_view_0: Front and side view showing the mesh upper, criss-cross laces, and prominent 'MERRELL' branding.
description_view_1: Rear and side view highlighting the heel structure, GORE-TEX tag, and the curve of the outsole.
description_view_2: Back angled view focusing on the heel, collar, and the continuation of the lugged sole pattern.
description_view_3: Front angled view displaying the toe box, lacing system, and the tread extending to the front.
attribute_logo: Yellow 'MERRELL' text on the side near the heel; small GORE-TEX tag on the side.
